description: This file contains SCSS mixins for handling border-radius properties, including helper functions to validate radius values and mixins for different border radius configurations such as top, bottom, start, end, and their combinations.

methods.name: valid-radius
methods.description: A helper SCSS function that ensures border-radius values are non-negative by replacing negative numbers with zero.

methods.name: border-radius
methods.description: A mixin applying border-radius if enabled, or fallback border-radius if provided.

methods.name: border-top-radius
methods.description: A mixin applying top-left and top-right border-radius with validation.

methods.name: border-end-radius
methods.description: A mixin applying top-right and bottom-right border-radius with validation.

methods.name: border-bottom-radius
methods.description: A mixin applying bottom-right and bottom-left border-radius with validation.

methods.name: border-start-radius
methods.description: A mixin applying top-left and bottom-left border-radius with validation.

methods.name: border-top-start-radius
methods.description: A mixin applying only top-left border-radius.

methods.name: border-top-end-radius
methods.description: A mixin applying only top-right border-radius.

methods.name: border-bottom-end-radius
methods.description: A mixin applying only bottom-right border-radius.

methods.name: border-bottom-start-radius
methods.description: A mixin applying only bottom-left border-radius.
